events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: the flex duct run fails on two combined defects — a crush point cutting the core to roughly half its rated diameter, and total run length (~45 ft) well beyond the SMACNA/manufacturer ~25 ft practical maximum and the Manual D-assumed effective length. Decision is `fail`, risk `high` (restricted airflow risks coil icing/short-cycling), with corrective actions to replace the crushed section, shorten/reroute the run, and re-support per SMACNA spacing/sag limits before closeout.
